behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names session.tsx path, export requirement, required store fields (items/failed/paused/edit), createStore requirement, persist module naming, workspace scoping, and no-any/no-try-catch constraints — all asserted specifics are discoverable.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what's broken and constraints (must use createStore, must wrap with persist, must be workspace-scoped) but doesn't prescribe exact code/variable names like 'persisted(Persist.workspace(...))'.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests use AST analysis and accept multiple persist function names (persisted/makePersisted/persist/withPersistence) and multiple workspace-scoping patterns (workspace/scoped/sdk.directory/project key).

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests invoke Babel parser via subprocess and perform AST-based structural inspection rather than pure text grep.

test_not_tautological.reason: test_followup_store_wrapped_with_persistence requires the followup declaration callee to be a persist function, and test_persistence_workspace_scoped requires workspace-scoping evidence; a stub can't satisfy these.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover persistence wrapping, workspace scoping, parse validity, and (truncated) likely the other constraints stated in instruction.md.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with comment headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) and named descriptively.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a code fix, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers (packages/app/src/pages/session.tsx, createStore, Persist.workspace) match consistently.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: File path is given but localization isn't the task; no exact line/variable fix is leaked.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not an agentmd-edits/config task.
